title: Otis Appoints Tracy Embree President, Otis Americas and Enrique Miñarro Viseras as President, Otis Europe, Middle East and Africa
text: Jim Cramer and Bernardo Calleja to retire in early 2024 FARMINGTON, Conn. , Sept. 28, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Otis Worldwide Corporation (NYSE: OTIS) announces the appointment of Tracy Embree as President, Otis Americas and Enrique Miñarro Viseras as President, Otis Europe, Middle East and Africa (EMEA), reporting directly to Otis Chair, CEO & President, Judy Marks.

title: Otis Worldwide Corporation (OTIS) Morgan Stanley 11th Annual Laguna Conference - (Transcript)
text: Otis Worldwide Corporation (NYSE:OTIS ) Morgan Stanley 11th Annual Laguna Conference Call September 14, 2023 12:20 PM ET Company Participants Judy Marks - Chair, Chief Executive Officer and President Conference Call Participants Joshua Pokrzywinski - Morgan Stanley Joshua Pokrzywinski All right. Good morning, everybody.

title: Students Set to Develop Ideas for Improved Access to Green Space
text: Otis' Made to Move Communities™ global competition brings much-needed attention to the health and wellbeing benefits of open spaces. FARMINGTON, Conn.

title: Otis CEO to Speak at Morgan Stanley Conference
text: FARMINGTON, Conn. , Sept. 1, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Otis Worldwide Corporation (NYSE: OTIS) Chair, CEO & President Judy Marks will participate in a fireside chat at the 11th annual Laguna conference hosted by Morgan Stanley on Thursday, September 14, 2023, at 9:20 a.m.
